'''ladate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irradicably|irradicably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irradicably|irradicably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ladate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ladate|ladate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ladatesher|ladatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladatesherĂ«m|ladatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ladatero|ladatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ladateshĂ«|ladateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladateshĂ«m|ladateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiladatero|gokiladatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiladateshĂ«|gokiladateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladateshĂ«m|gokiladateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goladankerom|goladankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goladankeshĂ«|goladankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goladankeshĂ«m|goladankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goladankeya|goladankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ladaterom|ladaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladatemu|ladatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ladateya|ladateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiladaterom|gokiladaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladatemu|gokiladatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiladateya|gokiladateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ladadate|ladadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ladadatesher|ladadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladadatesherĂ«m|ladadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ladadatero|ladadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ladadateshĂ«|ladadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladadateshĂ«m|ladadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiladadatero|gokiladadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiladadateshĂ«|gokiladadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladadateshĂ«m|gokiladadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goladadankerom|goladadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goladadankeshĂ«|goladadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goladadankeshĂ«m|goladadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goladadankeya|goladadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ladadaterom|ladadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladadatemu|ladadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ladadateya|ladadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiladadaterom|gokiladadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladadatemu|gokiladadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiladadateya|gokiladadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠdĂŠte|lĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠdĂŠtesher|lĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠdĂŠtero|lĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdĂŠtero|gokilĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠdĂŠnkerom|golĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠdĂŠnkeya|golĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠdĂŠterom|lĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠdĂŠtemu|lĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠdĂŠteya|lĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdĂŠterom|gokilĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdĂŠteya|gokilĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafdafte|lafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafdaftesher|lafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafdaftesherĂ«m|lafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafdaftero|lafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafdafteshĂ«|lafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafdafteshĂ«m|lafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafdaftero|gokilafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafdafteshĂ«|gokilafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafdafteshĂ«m|gokilafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafdafnkerom|golafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafdafnkeshĂ«|golafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafdafnkeshĂ«m|golafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafdafnkeya|golafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafdafterom|lafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafdaftemu|lafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafdafteya|lafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafdafterom|gokilafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafdaftemu|gokilafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafdafteya|gokilafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
